recommendations.title: Bionicle: The Legend Reborn
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Once the ruler of an entire universe, the Great Spirit Mata Nui finds himself cast out of his own body, his spirit trapped inside the fabled Mask of Life, hurtling through space. After landing on the far-away planet of Bara Magna, the mask creates a

recommendations.title: The Three Faces of Eve
recommendations.overview: A doctor treats a woman suffering from multiple personality disorder.

recommendations.title: Graduation Day
recommendations.overview: After the death of a high school track star during a race, a mysterious killer in a fencing mask begins murdering her friends and teachers.

recommendations.title: Son of the Mask
recommendations.overview: Tim Avery, an aspiring cartoonist, finds himself in a predicament when his dog stumbles upon the mask of Loki. Then after conceiving an infant son "born of the mask", he discovers just how looney child raising can be.

recommendations.title: Bionicle: Mask of Light
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: With darkness encroaching on the island of Mata Nui, the only hope for the survival of the islanders rests with two Matoran villagers, who must find the seventh Toa and deliver to him the fabled Mask of Light.

recommendations.title: Carved: The Slit-Mouthed Woman
recommendations.overview: Legend holds that 30 years ago, a suburban town was terrorized by the spirit of a woman whose horrid face had been grotesquely disfigured. Roaming the streets wearing a long coat and carrying large scissors, the spirit would approach her young victim

recommendations.title: Bruiser
recommendations.overview: After years of being browbeaten and walked on, a man wakes one day wearing an expressionless mask, fitted with a personality that enables him to take revenge.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Time Crash
recommendations.overview: After Martha Jones parts company with the Doctor, his TARDIS collides with another, and he comes face to face with one of his previous incarnations.

recommendations.title: Major Grom: Plague Doctor
recommendations.overview: In present day St. Petersburg, police major Igor Grom, an honest and skilled cop with unconventional methods, pursues a vigilante murderer in the mask of a plague doctor.

recommendations.title: Brave Citizen
recommendations.overview: An expelled boxing champion, who now is a high-school teacher, witnesses intolerable violence and throws her first punch to build justice against it, while putting on a mask.
